diffs.diff:
--- a/check_ckpt.py
+++ b/check_ckpt.py
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+import torch

+ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/ensemble/seed0.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False)

+print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys()) if isinstance(ckpt, dict) else type(ckpt))

+if isinstance(ckpt, dict):

+    for k, v in ckpt.items():

+        if hasattr(v, 'shape'):

+            print(k, v.shape)

+        elif isinstance(v, dict):

+            print(k, 'dict with', len(v), 'keys, sample:', list(v.keys())[:3])

+        else:

+            print(k, repr(v)[:100])
